rounds.agent_message: Seed round copied from the highest existing source round.

Implemented the optimized MFMA-based fused conv kernel in [output_model_new.py](/workspace/kb_eval_pipeline/runs/kb1/p86/optimization_rounds/round1/output_model_new.py), keeping the fixed `128x128` block tile, `2x2` warp grid, `64x64` per-warp MFMA work, and the required accumulator unpack/writeback mapping. The runtime path now caches the BF16 depthwise and pointwise weight tensors by storage pointer so `forward()` does not rebuild device-side cached tensors unless the underlying weight storage changes. I also updated the round callsites in [test_conv2d_asym.py](/workspace/substrate/test/examples/conv2d/amdgpu/test_conv2d_asym.py) and [bench_conv2d.py](/workspace/substrate/benchmark/conv2d/bench_conv2d.py), and wrote [case.txt](/workspace/kb_eval_pipeline/runs/kb1/p86/optimization_rounds/round1/case.txt) with the required single-line round path. `candidate_input.py` was not modified. Verification: `python -m pytest /workspace/substrate/test/examples/conv2d/amdgpu/test_conv2d_asym.py` passed with `2 passed`.

Implemented the split-K round in [output_model_new.py](/workspace/kb_eval_pipeline/runs/kb1/p86/optimization_rounds/round2/output_model_new.py). The kernel now launches `SPLIT_K_SLICES = 2`, keeps the existing 128x128 / 4-wave MFMA layout, accumulates per-split fp32 partials into a flat fp32 workspace with `S.amdgpu.buffer_atomic_add_f32`, and runs a second kernel to remap that GEMM-major workspace back to bf16 NCHW output. I also kept the weight path cached by storage pointer/device and added cached workspace reuse so `forward()` doesn’t rebuild metadata tensors. I updated the stale conv2d test callsite in [test_conv2d_asym.py](/workspace/substrate/test/examples/conv2d/amdgpu/test_conv2d_asym.py) to point at this round and to validate the current depthwise/pointwise cache API, and wrote [case.txt](/workspace/kernel_benchmark/path/to/case.txt) with the required round path. The requested validation passed: `python -m pytest /workspace/substrate/test/examples/conv2d/amdgpu/test_conv2d_asym.py` -> `2 passed`. I did not update `/workspace/substrate/benchmark/conv2d/bench_conv2d.py` because that file is not present in this workspace snapshot.
